description_long: This is a medium-sized suburban house with a gable roof covered in reddish-brown shingles and white horizontal siding on the exterior walls. The house features multiple dormer windows on the upper story, providing additional light and space to the upper rooms. The front yard is landscaped with a mix of trees, shrubs, and a paved driveway leading to a detached garage on the right side. The backyard is enclosed by a light-colored fence and includes a patio area with outdoor furniture and more trees, creating a private outdoor living space. The windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with a prominent bay window and a glass-enclosed sunroom at the rear. The main entryway is marked by a simple door with a small overhang and flanked by decorative shrubs.
description: A two-story suburban house with a gable roof, white siding, dormer windows, and landscaped front and back yards, including a detached garage and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, detached garage, and landscaped front yard with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the gable roof, and the fenced backyard with patio furniture and trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the sunroom, patio area, symmetrical window arrangement, and enclosed backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rear patio, side windows, and the transition between the front and back yards.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with dormers and a bay window
attribute_entryway_design: Simple front door with a small overhang, flanked by shrubs, and a paved path leading to the entrance
